'''Najus''' was a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Artisan/Legends|artisan]] who at one point pursued a vendetta against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. To aid with his efforts, Najus crafted the powerful and legendary [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Sith artifact/Legends|artifacts]] known as the [[Bracers of Najus]]. To discourage anyone from utilizing the bracers against the Sith, Najus designed them so that they provided no beneficial effect to their wielder when used against an opponent who drew upon the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—and in fact even aided such an adversary. At some point, the Bracers of Najus were transported by a group of Sith aboard a [[Unidentified starship (Leritor)|starship]] that eventually crashed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Leritor/Legends|Leritor]], where the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] remained buried for [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]].<ref name="Gamer10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Najus was introduced in the [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure "[[Standoff on Leritor]]," which was authored by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 10|tenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine<ref name="Gamer10" /> on [[April 19]], [[2002]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020416.html|text=Episode II in Gamer #10}}</ref>
